1→lunetics_locale:
     2→    strict_mode: true
     3→    guessing_order:
     4→        - hlguesser
     5→        - router
     6→        - query
     7→        - browser
     8→    allowed_locales: ['fr']
     9→
    10→sonata_translation:

    13→    locales: ['fr']
    14→    default_locale: '%env(GENERIC_LOCALE)%'
    15→    # here enable the types you need

   395→liip_imagine:
   396→    resolvers:
   397→        default:
   398→            web_path: ~
   399→        profile_photos:
   400→            aws_s3:
   401→                client_config:
   402→                    key: '%amazons3.key%'
   403→                    secret: '%amazons3.secret%'
   404→                    region: '%amazons3.region%'
   405→                    version: latest
   406→                bucket: eliberty-redpill-cache
   407→
   408→    cache: ~
   409→    filter_sets:
   410→        image_upload_thumbnail:
   411→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   412→            filters:
   413→                thumbnail: { size: [100, 100], mode: outbound }
   414→
   415→        elfinder_thumbnail:
   416→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   417→            quality: 85
   418→            filters:
   419→                thumbnail: { size: [48, 48], mode: inset }
   420→
   421→        cmf_block:
   422→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   423→            quality: 85
   424→            filters:
   425→                thumbnail: { size: [50, 50], mode: outbound }
   426→
   427→        cmf_promo_block:
   428→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   429→            quality: 85
   430→            filters:
   431→                thumbnail: { size: [380, 260], mode: outbound }
   432→
   433→        cmf_carousel_block:
   434→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   435→            quality: 85
   436→            filters:
   437→                upscale: { min: [1600, 640] }
   438→        cmf_banner_block:
   439→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   440→            quality: 85
   441→        cmf_email_header:
   442→            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
   443→            quality: 85
   444→            filters:
   445→                thumbnail: { size: [600, 50], mode: outbound }
   446→
   447→cmf_media:
   448→    use_imagine: true
   449→    extra_filters:
   450→        cmf_block: 'cmf_block'
   451→        cmf_promo_block: 'cmf_promo_block'
   452→        cmf_carousel_block: 'cmf_carousel_block'
   453→        cmf_banner_block: 'cmf_banner_block'
   454→    upload_file_role: ROLE_CAN_UPLOAD_FILE
   455→    use_jms_serializer: auto
   456→    use_elfinder: auto
   457→    persistence:
   458→        phpcr:
   459→            enabled: true
   460→            media_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/media'
   461→
   462→fm_elfinder:
   463→    instances:
   464→        default:
   465→            locale: '%env(GENERIC_LOCALE)%' # defaults to current request locale
   466→            editor: ckeditor # other options are tinymce, tinymce4, form, custom and simple

   468→            theme: smoothness # jquery theme

   470→            path_prefix: ''

   475→                        show_hidden: false # defaults to false
   476→                        driver: cmf_media.adapter.elfinder.phpcr_driver
   477→                        path: '%cmf_media.persistence.phpcr.media_basepath%'
   478→                        upload_allow: ['all']
   479→                        upload_max_size: 5M
   480→        form:

   482→            editor: form # other options are tinymce, tinymce4, form, custom and simple
   483→            fullscreen: true # defaults true, applies to simple and ckeditor editors
   484→            theme: smoothness # jquery theme

   486→            path_prefix: ''
   487→            connector:

   491→                        show_hidden: false # defaults to false
   492→                        driver: cmf_media.adapter.elfinder.phpcr_driver
   493→                        path: '%cmf_media.persistence.phpcr.media_basepath%'
   494→                        upload_allow: ['all']
   495→                        upload_max_size: 5M
   496→

   499→        title: '%rp.seo.title%'

   501→            name:
   502→                keywords: '%rp.seo.keywords%'
   503→                description: '%rp.seo.description%'
   504→                robots: index, follow
   505→                viewport: width=device-width, height=device-height, user-scalable=no
   506→                HandheldFriendly: 'true'
   507→
   508→            property: '%rp.seo.og%'
   509→
   510→            http-equiv:
   511→                'Content-Type': text/html; charset=utf-8
   512→                'X-Ua-Compatible': IE=edge
   513→
   514→        head:
   515→            'xmlns': http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml

   522→

file.content:
lunetics_locale:
    strict_mode: true
    guessing_order:
        - hlguesser
        - router
        - query
        - browser
    allowed_locales: ['fr']

sonata_translation:
    locale_switcher_show_country_flags: false
    #real locales are defined at runtime via compilerpass and env
    locales: ['fr']
    default_locale: '%env(GENERIC_LOCALE)%'
    # here enable the types you need
    gedmo:
        enabled: true
    #    knplabs:
    #        enabled: true
    phpcr:
        enabled: true

doctrine_phpcr:
    session:
        backend:
            logging: true
            profiling: true
            type: doctrinedbal
            factory: cmf_jackalope_doctrinedbal_factory
            connection: phpcr
            caches:
                meta: phpcr_cache
                nodes: phpcr_cache
        workspace: default
        username: '%cmf.username%'
        password: '%cmf.password%'
    odm:
        proxy_dir: '%kernel.cache_dir%/doctrine/PHPCRProxies'
        auto_mapping: false
        auto_generate_proxy_classes: '%kernel.debug%'
        metadata_cache_driver: apc
        mappings:
            CmfBlockBundle: ~
            CmfContentBundle: ~
            CmfMediaBundle: ~
            CmfMenuBundle: ~
            CmfRoutingBundle: ~
            CmfSeoBundle: ~
            RedpillCmsBundle: ~
            RedpillBundle: ~
        locales:
            en:
                - de
                - fr
                - it
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            de:
                - en
                - fr
                - it
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            fr:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            it:
                - en
                - de
                - fr
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            sl:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - fr
                - hr
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            hr:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - fr
                - sl
                - es
                - ca
                - nl
            es:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - fr
                - sl
                - hr
                - ca
                - nl
            ca:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - fr
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - nl
            nl:
                - en
                - de
                - it
                - fr
                - sl
                - hr
                - es
                - ca

cmf_core:
    multilang:
        #real locales are defined at runtime via compilerpass and env
        locales: ['fr']
    persistence:
        phpcr:
            basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms'
            enabled: true

cmf_routing:
    chain:
        routers_by_id:
            router.default: 200
            cmf_routing.dynamic_router: 100

    dynamic:
        persistence:
            phpcr:
                enabled: true
                manager_name: ~
                route_basepaths:
                    - '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/routes'
                    - '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/content/pages'
        generic_controller: RedpillBundle:Default:home
        controllers_by_class:
            Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Document\Cms\Page: Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Controller\ContentController:indexAction
            Symfony\Cmf\Bundle\RoutingBundle\Doctrine\Phpcr\RedirectRoute: rpcms.routing.redirect_controller:redirectAction
        templates_by_class:
            Eliberty\RedpillBundle\Document\Cms\Page: RedpillCmsBundle:Static:index.html.twig

cmf_content:
    persistence:
        phpcr:
            content_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/content'

cmf_seo:
    persistence:
        phpcr: true

cmf_menu:
    persistence:
        phpcr:
            enabled: true
            content_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/content/pages'
            menu_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/menu'
            node_document_class: Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Document\MenuNode

cmf_resource:
    repositories:
        default:
            type: doctrine/phpcr-odm
            basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%'

sonata_block:
    default_contexts: [cms]
    blocks:
        sonata.admin.block.search_result:
            contexts: [admin]
        sonata.admin.block.admin_list:
            contexts: [admin]
        rpcms_admin_doctrine_phpcr.tree_block:
            settings:
                id: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%'
            contexts: [admin]
        rpcms_block.homepromo:
            settings:
                maxItems: 5
        rpcms_block.carousel_slide:
            settings:
                maxItems: 5
        rpcms_block.carousel_document:
            settings:
                maxItems: 5
        rp.v2_toggleizer: ~
        rpcms_block.tree_browser: ~
        rpcms_block.node_creator: ~
        rp.dashboard_order_count: ~
        rp.dashboard_turnover: ~

sonata_admin:
    title_logo: /bundles/redpill/images/elib_bevel.png
    global_search:
        case_sensitive: false
    extensions:
        rpcms.sonata.publish.horodata.extension:
            implements:
                - Symfony\Cmf\Bundle\CoreBundle\PublishWorkflow\PublishTimePeriodInterface
                - Symfony\Cmf\Bundle\CoreBundle\PublishWorkflow\PublishableInterface
            excludes:
                - rp.admin.configuration_profil_menu
                - rp.admin.configuration
                - rpcms_block.faqqa_admin
                - rpcms_block.card_admin
        rpcms.admin_extension.translatable:
            admins:
                - rpcms_block.quicky_admin

    dashboard:
        groups:
            email:
                label: Emails
                items:
                    - rpcms_email.layout_admin
                    - rpcms_email.content_admin
                    - rpcms_email.block_string_admin
            sms:
                label: Sms
                items:
                    - rpcms_sms.content_admin
            website:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.main_components
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rp.block.website_admin
                    - rp.block.homepage_admin
                    - rpcms.menu_admin
                    - rpcms.node_child_admin

            headers:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.headers
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rp.block.header_admin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\CarouselSlideBlockAdmin
                    - rpcms_block.header_2_btn_admin

            rows:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.rows
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rpcms_block.container_admin
                    - rpcms_block.reinsurance_row_admin
                    - rpcms_block.footer_admin
                    - rpcms_block.col3_admin
                    - rpcms_block.col12_admin
                    - rpcms_block.col21_admin
                    - rpcms_block.cardline_admin

            blocprice:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.price_blocks
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rpcms_block.quicky_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickest_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickest_la_plagne_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickestpacks_admin
                    - rpcms_block.section_one_product_admin
                    - rpcms_block.section_two_products_admin
                    - rpcms_block.section_video_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickestpacks_lesarcs_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickest_lesarcs_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quicker_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quicker_s3v_admin
                    - rpcms_block.card_admin
                    - rpcms_block.bottle_admin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\QuickestSkewBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\TitleToBlocksBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\ItemTitleToBlocksBlockAdmin

            blocv2:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.standard_blocks
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rpcms_block.exclu_admin
                    - rpcms_block.textpic_admin
                    - rpcms_block.textfullpic_admin
                    - rpcms_block.double_admin
                    - rpcms_block.textpicdouble_admin
                    - rpcms_block.simplepic_admin
                    - rpcms_block.linktext_admin
                    - rpcms_block.linknewsletter_admin
                    - rpcms_block.helpicon_admin
                    - rpcms_block.customcarousel_admin
                    - rpcms_block.meteo_admin
                    - rpcms_block.arrow_admin
                    - rpcms_block.rightpic_admin
                    - rpcms_block.scrollcontainer_admin
                    - rpcms_block.scrollframe_admin
                    - rpcms_block.news_feed_admin
                    - rpcms_block.ski_guru_review_admin

            bloc3:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.3/3_blocs
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - rpcms_block.triple_admin
                    - rpcms_block.testimonial_admin
                    - rpcms_block.h1_admin
                    - rpcms_block.skewbutton_admin
                    - rpcms_block.faq_admin
                    - rpcms_block.review_admin
                    - rpcms_block.faqqa_admin
                    - rpcms_block.oz_map_admin
                    - rpcms_block.textlongpic_admin
                    - rpcms_block.doublecross_admin

            content:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.content_blocks
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    - cmf_block.string_admin
                    - cmf_sonata_phpcr_admin_integration.block.simple_admin

            # Items to clean...
            blocdesign:
                label: rp.admin.dashboard.cms.perso_blocks
                label_catalogue: 'rp_sonata'
                items:
                    #OZ
                    - rpcms_block.oz_map_admin

                    - rpcms_block.calendar_event_la_plagne_admin

                    - rpcms_block.calendar_admin
                    - rpcms_block.calendar_event_admin
                    - rpcms_block.rightpicparallax_admin
                    - rpcms_block.leftpicparallax_admin
                    #LES ARCS
                    - rpcms_block.quickest_lesarcs_admin
                    - rpcms_block.quickestpacks_lesarcs_admin
                    - rpcms_block.activities_lesarcs_admin
                    #ADELBODEN
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\QuickestSkewBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\DynamicMapResortLinkBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\TextImageCarouselBlockAdmin
                    #SCV
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\CarouselScrollBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\ItemCarouselScrollBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\ImageCarouselScrollBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\TilesBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\FaqListBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\FaqListCategoryBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\FaqListItemBlockAdmin
                    #STVI
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\TitleToBlocksBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\ItemTitleToBlocksBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\TilesDescriptionBlockAdmin
                    - Eliberty\RedpillCmsBundle\Admin\ItemTileSimpleBlockAdmin
                    - rpcms_block.carousel_event_admin
                    - rpcms_block.event_admin

    templates:
        layout: RedpillBundle:Console\Cms:layout_sonata_3.html.twig
        list: RedpillBundle:Console\Cms\Admin\Layout:_list_layout.html.twig
        edit: RedpillBundle:Console\Cms\Admin\Layout:_edit_layout.html.twig
        list_block: RedpillBundle:Console\Cms\Admin\Layout:block_admin_list.html.twig
        base_list_field: RedpillBundle:Console\Cms\Admin\Layout:base_list_field.html.twig

liip_imagine:
    resolvers:
        default:
            web_path: ~
        profile_photos:
            aws_s3:
                client_config:
                    key: '%amazons3.key%'
                    secret: '%amazons3.secret%'
                    region: '%amazons3.region%'
                    version: latest
                bucket: eliberty-redpill-cache

    cache: ~
    filter_sets:
        image_upload_thumbnail:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            filters:
                thumbnail: { size: [100, 100], mode: outbound }

        elfinder_thumbnail:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
            filters:
                thumbnail: { size: [48, 48], mode: inset }

        cmf_block:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
            filters:
                thumbnail: { size: [50, 50], mode: outbound }

        cmf_promo_block:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
            filters:
                thumbnail: { size: [380, 260], mode: outbound }

        cmf_carousel_block:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
            filters:
                upscale: { min: [1600, 640] }
        cmf_banner_block:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
        cmf_email_header:
            data_loader: cmf_media_doctrine_phpcr
            quality: 85
            filters:
                thumbnail: { size: [600, 50], mode: outbound }

cmf_media:
    use_imagine: true
    extra_filters:
        cmf_block: 'cmf_block'
        cmf_promo_block: 'cmf_promo_block'
        cmf_carousel_block: 'cmf_carousel_block'
        cmf_banner_block: 'cmf_banner_block'
    upload_file_role: ROLE_CAN_UPLOAD_FILE
    use_jms_serializer: auto
    use_elfinder: auto
    persistence:
        phpcr:
            enabled: true
            media_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/media'

fm_elfinder:
    instances:
        default:
            locale: '%env(GENERIC_LOCALE)%' # defaults to current request locale
            editor: ckeditor # other options are tinymce, tinymce4, form, custom and simple
            fullscreen: true # defaults true, applies to simple and ckeditor editors
            theme: smoothness # jquery theme
            include_assets: true # disable if you want to handle loading of the javascript and css assets yourself
            path_prefix: ''
            connector:
                debug: true # defaults to false
                roots: # at least one root must be defined
                    uploads:
                        show_hidden: false # defaults to false
                        driver: cmf_media.adapter.elfinder.phpcr_driver
                        path: '%cmf_media.persistence.phpcr.media_basepath%'
                        upload_allow: ['all']
                        upload_max_size: 5M
        form:
            locale: '%env(GENERIC_LOCALE)%' # defaults to current request locale
            editor: form # other options are tinymce, tinymce4, form, custom and simple
            fullscreen: true # defaults true, applies to simple and ckeditor editors
            theme: smoothness # jquery theme
            include_assets: true # disable if you want to handle loading of the javascript and css assets yourself
            path_prefix: ''
            connector:
                debug: false # defaults to false
                roots: # at least one root must be defined
                    uploads:
                        show_hidden: false # defaults to false
                        driver: cmf_media.adapter.elfinder.phpcr_driver
                        path: '%cmf_media.persistence.phpcr.media_basepath%'
                        upload_allow: ['all']
                        upload_max_size: 5M

sonata_seo:
    page:
        title: '%rp.seo.title%'
        metas:
            name:
                keywords: '%rp.seo.keywords%'
                description: '%rp.seo.description%'
                robots: index, follow
                viewport: width=device-width, height=device-height, user-scalable=no
                HandheldFriendly: 'true'

            property: '%rp.seo.og%'

            http-equiv:
                'Content-Type': text/html; charset=utf-8
                'X-Ua-Compatible': IE=edge

        head:
            'xmlns': http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml
            'xmlns:og': http://opengraphprotocol.org/schema/
cmf_block:
    persistence:
        phpcr:
            enabled: true
            block_basepath: '/%env(RP_WEBINSTANCE)%/cms/content'

cmf_sonata_phpcr_admin_integration:
    bundles:
        block: ~
        content:
            fos_ckeditor:
                enabled: true
                config_name: cms_pages

sonata_doctrine_phpcr_admin:
    document_tree:
        routing_defaults: [locale]

content.text:
The issue is clear: `metadata_cache_driver: apc` on line 41 of `cmf_common.yaml`, but APC extension is not available in your environment.

Let me check what environment this is being used in and what dev config overrides exist:

There's no dev override for `doctrine_phpcr`. The fix is to override the `metadata_cache_driver` to use `array` (or `filesystem`) instead of `apc` in the dev environment config.

Let me check if there's a dev doctrine_phpcr config:
No dev override exists. I'll create one that overrides `metadata_cache_driver` to `array` for dev:

Created `config/packages/dev/doctrine_phpcr.yaml` which overrides the `metadata_cache_driver` from `apc` to `array` for the dev environment.

The root cause: `cmf_common.yaml:41` sets `metadata_cache_driver: apc` globally, but the APC PHP extension (`apcu` with the compatibility shim, or the old `apc` extension) isn't available in your environment. The `array` driver keeps metadata in memory for the duration of the request — appropriate for dev.

If you also need this fixed in test environments, check `config/packages/test/` similarly. For prod/preprod/staging, you'd want `apcu` (the modern replacement for `apc`) — those configs already use `apc` and would need the PHP `apcu` extension installed.

lastPrompt: need to fix: Symfony\Component\Debug\Exception\UndefinedFunctionException: Attempted to call function "apc_fetch" from the global namespace.    at vendor/doctrine/cache/lib/Doctrine/Common/Cache/ApcCa…

message.content: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>
